title: Force Enlightenment
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Force_Enlightenment.jpg|thumb|Force Enlightenment was achieved through the prolonged study of the Force.]]
'''Force Enlightenment''' was a passive/supplementary light side [[Force power/Legends|Force power]]. The most well-known [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who used this power frequently was [[Meetra Surik]], who learned it after a significant conversation with [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] [[Vrook Lamar]], [[Kavar]], and [[Zez-Kai Ell]].

When activated, this power took the [[The Force/Legends|Force]] powers a Jedi was most skilled in, pushing them to the highest degree that the Jedi had previously mastered during his or her routine training. The affected powers that the Jedi Exile used to enlight were [[Force speed/Legends|Force speed]], [[Tutaminis|Force Defend]] (Force Armor or Force Shield), and [[Force valor]]. The end result was an "enlightened" Jedi, having unlocked and harnessed fully their ability in that technique.

==Behind the scenes==
If the Jedi Exile follows the non-canon dark side, she learns [[Telekinesis/Legends#Choking powers#Force crush|Force Crush]] instead of Force Enlightenment.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Old Republic: Revan]]'' {{Ab|The Old Republic: Revan (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
